notes: Pilot low bar; record flat blank, post-arch, post-sand, final frame.
Pilot reference bar; use to calibrate K and arch schedule.
Pilot high bar; validate shallow arch and short resonator behavior.
Pilot material K check before underside arch.
CNC arch check; center thickness must remain at or above 0.250 in.

Node support and frame buzz check.
A4 hand-tuning reference; target is normal final sanding allowance.
A4 tube should reinforce without shifting perceived pitch.
A4 node support and frame buzz check.
Treble material K check before shallow arch.
Treble CNC arch check; avoid overly stiff or dead response.
C6 node support and frame buzz check.
